SOx Emissions Concentration (kg/m³)
==================================================

.. math::

   \text{}

.. raw:: html

   <table class="kpi-table">
      <tbody>
         <tr>
            <td>Description</td>
            <td><ul><li>The SOx Emissions Concentration measures the amount of sulfur oxides emitted per cubic meter of flue gas</li><li>This KPI is crucial for understanding the environmental impact of emissions from industrial processes</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Objective</td>
            <td><ul><li>The primary objective of this KPI is to monitor compliance with environmental regulations regarding sulfur oxide emissions</li><li>ensuring that emissions are kept within acceptable limits</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Formula</td>
            <td>
               <p>The concentration is calculated by dividing the total weight of sulfur oxides emitted in kilograms by the total volume of flue gas in cubic meters.</p>
               <div class="math-equation">$$ \mathit{Sox\,Rate} = \frac{\mathit{Sox\,Emitted\,Kg}}{\mathit{Flue\,Gas\,Volume\,M3}} $$</div><ul><li>Sox Emitted Kg: Value used in the calculation as defined by the code implementation.</li><li>Flue Gas Volume M3: Value used in the calculation as defined by the code implementation.</li></ul><script>if (window.MathJax) {  if (MathJax.typesetPromise) { MathJax.typesetPromise(); }  else if (MathJax.typeset) { MathJax.typeset(); }}</script>
            </td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Used in KPI(s)</td>
            <td><ul><li>This KPI is used in environmental performance assessments and regulatory compliance reporting</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Input Measure</td>
            <td><ul><li>The inputs for this KPI include the total weight of sulfur oxides emitted and the total volume of flue gas produced</li></ul></td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Unit of Measure</td>
            <td>kg/m³</td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Reporting Source</td>
            <td>The data for this KPI is typically sourced from emissions monitoring systems and environmental compliance reports.</td>
         </tr>
         <tr>
            <td>Comments</td>
            <td>Monitoring SOx emissions concentration is essential for minimizing air pollution and adhering to environmental standards.</td>
         </tr>
      </tbody>
   </table>

.. admonition:: Code Context
   :class: dropdown

   .. code-block:: python
      :linenos:
   
      :emphasize-lines: 5
   

      def calculate_sox_emissions_rate(sox_emitted_kg: float, flue_gas_volume_m3: float) -> float:
       """Calculates the concentration of SOx in emissions."""
       if flue_gas_volume_m3 == 0:
           return 0.0
       # KPI: SOx Emissions Concentration (kg/m³)
       # Monitors compliance with environmental regulations for sulfur oxide emissions.
       sox_rate = sox_emitted_kg / flue_gas_volume_m3
       return sox_rate
